// Utilitário de tradução automática simples - sem armazenamento
class AutoTranslator{constructor(){this.cache=new Map();this.currentLanguage='pt';this.currentLanguage=localStorage.getItem('language')||'pt';}setLanguage(lang){if(this.currentLanguage===lang)return;console.log(`Mudando idioma para: ${lang}`);this.currentLanguage=lang;localStorage.setItem('language',lang);// Traduzir imediatamente
this.translatePage();}getCurrentLanguage(){return this.currentLanguage;}// Traduzir texto usando Google Translate web API
async translateText(text){let fromLang=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'pt';let toLang=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:'en';if(fromLang===toLang)return text;// Verificar cache primeiro
const cacheKey=`${fromLang}-${toLang}`;if(!this.cache.has(cacheKey)){this.cache.set(cacheKey,new Map());}const langCache=this.cache.get(cacheKey);if(langCache.has(text)){return langCache.get(text);}try{// Usar Google Translate web API (grátis)
const url=`https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single?client=gtx&sl=${fromLang}&tl=${toLang}&dt=t&q=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`;const response=await fetch(url);if(!response.ok){throw new Error('API de tradução falhou');}const data=await response.json();if(data&&data[0]&&data[0][0]&&data[0][0][0]){const translatedText=data[0][0][0];langCache.set(text,translatedText);return translatedText;}}catch(error){console.warn('Tradução falhou, usando texto original:',error);}return text;// Fallback para texto original
}// Traduzir todos os nós de texto da página
async translatePage(){if(this.currentLanguage==='pt'){// Se for português, restaura o texto original (recarrega a página)
window.location.reload();return;}const textNodes=this.getTextNodes(document.body);const translations=[];for(const node of textNodes){var _node$textContent;const originalText=(_node$textContent=node.textContent)===null||_node$textContent===void 0?void 0:_node$textContent.trim();if(originalText&&originalText.length>0){translations.push(this.translateText(originalText,'pt',this.currentLanguage).then(translated=>{if(node.textContent){node.textContent=translated;}}));}}await Promise.all(translations);}// Get all text nodes from an element
getTextNodes(element){const textNodes=[];const walker=document.createTreeWalker(element,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode:node=>{var _node$textContent2;// Skip script, style, and input elements
const parent=node.parentElement;if(!parent)return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;const tagName=parent.tagName.toLowerCase();if(['script','style','noscript','input','textarea'].includes(tagName)){return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;}// Skip if text is just whitespace
if(!((_node$textContent2=node.textContent)!==null&&_node$textContent2!==void 0&&_node$textContent2.trim())){return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;}// Skip protected elements
if(this.isProtectedElement(parent)){return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;}// Skip if text contains only emojis or flags
if(this.isEmojiOrFlagOnly(node.textContent)){return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;}return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let node;// eslint-disable-next-line no-cond-assign
while(node=walker.nextNode()){textNodes.push(node);}return textNodes;}// Check if element should be protected from translation
isProtectedElement(element){// Check for data-no-translate attribute
if(element.hasAttribute('data-no-translate')&&element.getAttribute('data-no-translate')==='true'){return true;}// Check for no-translate class
if(element.classList.contains('no-translate')){return true;}// Check for role="img" (icons, flags, etc.)
if(element.getAttribute('role')==='img'){return true;}// Check if element or any parent is an SVG
if(element.closest('svg')){return true;}// Check if element is an image
if(element.tagName.toLowerCase()==='img'){return true;}return false;}// Check if text contains only emojis or flags
isEmojiOrFlagOnly(text){// Remove whitespace
const trimmed=text.trim();if(!trimmed)return false;// Check if text contains only flag emojis (🇺🇸, 🇧🇷, 🇪🇸, etc.)
const flagRegex=/^[\p{RI}\p{Emoji}]+$/u;// Check if it's mainly emojis (more than 50% emoji characters)
const emojiRegex=/[\p{Emoji}\p{RI}]/gu;const emojiMatches=trimmed.match(emojiRegex)||[];const emojiRatio=emojiMatches.length/trimmed.length;return flagRegex.test(trimmed)||emojiRatio>0.5;}}// Create global instance
export const autoTranslator=new AutoTranslator();// Hook for React components
export const useAutoTranslate=()=>{return{translate:(text,toLang)=>autoTranslator.translateText(text,'pt',toLang||autoTranslator.getCurrentLanguage()),setLanguage:lang=>autoTranslator.setLanguage(lang),getCurrentLanguage:()=>autoTranslator.getCurrentLanguage(),translatePage:()=>autoTranslator.translatePage()};};
